features.name: Infrastructure & Build System
features.details: Kotlin DSL, version catalogs, AGP 8.5.2, Kotlin 2.0.21, Room database, package structure

features.name: Keyboard Layout & Rendering
features.details: Compose keyboard UI, theme system, key data model, 5-row QWERTY, touch handling, modifier state machine, suggestion bar, toolbar, IME integration via ComposeView

features.name: Macros, Ctrl Mode & Clipboard
features.details: Macro engine + recording/chips/grid UI, Ctrl-held shortcut overlay, clipboard manager, symbols layer, KeyboardMode sealed class. 17 new files, 8 modified.

features.name: Voice-to-Text, Command Mode & Autocorrect
features.details: Whisper TF Lite voice input (graceful degradation without model), dictionary-based autocorrect (mild default), command-aware mode (auto-detect terminals + manual toggle), learned words, SessionDependencies bridge. 13 new files, 8 modified.

features.name: Settings, Export/Import & Polish
features.details: Full Compose settings hub replacing legacy PreferenceActivity, JSON export/import via kotlinx.serialization, compact mode (hide number row), performance audit, 28 unit tests, ProGuard rules, resource shrinking, branding cleanup.

features.name: Room Database
features.details: 4 active tables (macros, learned_words, clipboard_history, command_apps), 4 DAOs with Flow queries, destructive migration (needs proper migrations before schema changes)

features.name: v1.0 Pre-Release Phase 1 — Feature Completion
features.details: 8-phase feature-completion wave for v1.0 pre-release: (1) voice asset dir + provenance scaffold + LFS rules, (2) SwiftKey reference dir + first captured reference (compact-dark) + findings doc, (3) plugin dictionary loading gated on BuildConfig.DEBUG closing GH #4, (4) predictive next-word after space — Suggest.getNextWordSuggestions with shared empty WordComposer + BinaryDictionary empty-composer guard + dictionary.cpp checkFirstCharacter bypass when mInputLength==0 (JNI scope expansion) + LatinIME.setNextSuggestions rewrite with getLastCommittedWordBeforeCursor, (5) KeyData.longPressCodes multi-char field + KeyView pointerInput drag-to-select Popup + LongPressPopup helper + SymbolsLayout long-press data, (6) DevKeyTheme dark palette retuned from SwiftKey COMPACT reference (keyBgSpecial=keyBg critical correction; light palette deferred per user) + comprehensive tokenize-everything sweep (100+ new semantic tokens, 18 UI files, zero Color(0x|.dp|.sp literals outside DevKeyTheme.kt), (7) VoiceInputEngine DevKeyLogger.voice instrumentation (16 call sites, integer-only payloads, privacy-audited clean) + voice E2E verification checklist, (8) regression smoke checklist + clean assembleDebug+lint quality gate. 11 logical commits on main (unpushed).
